text: Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K this morning. 600+ runners, perfect weather, and every dollar goes to youth ACL screening. Proud of this Birmingham community. #RunBham
Ran the 5K with Coach Perry pushing the pace the whole way. 18:42 PR. Thank you Coach.
@devonmitchell_track that PR was all you. Recover well tonight, we get back to mechanics Tuesday. Proud of you young man.
Crestwood Cross Country Invitational at Oak Mountain today. Cold start, hills for days. My distance crew left it all on the course. That's how you open a season.
Oak Mountain humbles everybody. Sprinters did the work in the weight room all fall and it showed. Proud of this Crestwood team.
5:15 AM run done before the annual physical. Crestwood South loop, 33 degrees, headlamp weather. The hardest part of any run is the front door. Let's work.
Morning service at New Hope AME, then dinner at Mama's. The choir brought the house down on 'Total Praise.' Merry Christmas from the Perry family. Glory to the newborn King.
@coachperry that tenor section carried us this morning, brother. See you first Sunday for rehearsal. Blessings to Sister Brenda.
Mercedes-Benz Marathon weekend in my own backyard. Running the half tomorrow. Goal is a sub-1:30 and to not blow up on that Highland Ave climb. Birmingham, let's go.
Smart race plan. Negative split the back half and you'll get your sub-1:30. Hydrate tonight. Proud to have you as a patient AND a friend, Shannon.
Thanksgiving at Brenda's. Shannon brought the smoked turkey and Keisha made the mac. Family, food, and a little football. Grateful. Roll Tide.
Iron Bowl. Bama. Auburn. My nerves. That is the whole tweet. ROLL TIDE ROLL.
Nephew you spelled Roll wrong but I forgive you because we up two scores. Pass the wings.
Drove Devon up for his unofficial visit today. Watching a kid you've coached since 9th grade walk a D1 facility for the first time hits different. Stay humble, stay hungry.
@coachperry great having you and Devon on campus. That young man is coachable and fast — rare combo. We'll be in touch.
Standing at the 16th Street Baptist Church this MLK morning with my athletes. They run on a track other people bled to build. We never forget that here in Birmingham.
Crestwood track season opener is HERE. Two months of 6 AM lifts and hill repeats come down to this. Devon in the 100, Trey in the 400. Come out and support these kids.
Opened in 49.8 in the 400. First time under 50 ever. Coach Perry had me convinced I could do it. Let's keep climbing.
New brisket method this weekend: 225 low and slow, wrapped at 165, rested two hours. Best bark I've pulled off the Saturday smoker yet. Birmingham BBQ standards are high.
Reminder: early specialization is the #1 driver of youth ACL injuries we see at Iron City Sports Medicine. Let kids play multiple sports. Coaches, this is on us too.
@dranitalawson preach. Half my track kids only run because a coach let them try it sophomore year. Multi-sport athletes are healthier AND faster. Every time.
Watch Night service tonight at New Hope AME. We close out the year the way we started it — on our knees and in praise. Doors open at 9. All are welcome.
